_documentation: Per-milestone progress for the public roadmap's in-flight cards. Generated by scripts/sync-roadmap-progress.py from the repo's GitHub milestones. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND: the roadmap-progress workflow overwrites it whenever an issue or milestone changes. Keyed by milestone title (vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). percent = closed / total. assets/js/roadmap-progress.js renders a bar onto the card carrying the matching data-milestone.
